text.title: Research Workflows Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Research Workflows. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Workflow steps are prose paragraphs without methodology slugs.
antipattern.fix: Every step references an existing methodology slug; reject prose-only steps.

antipattern.symptom: Steps lack acceptance criteria; executor cannot tell when done.
antipattern.fix: Require acceptance criterion per step (artefact present + validator pass).

antipattern.symptom: Workflow has 12 steps; executor drops off.
